de: Der aktive Vulkan Hasan in Türkiye steht unter Beobachtung. en: Türkiye's active volcano Mount Hasan is under observation. While Mount Hasan, which erupted 7 thousand years before Christ, continues to be active despite the passing of thousands of years, the gas and water rise that last occurred in the February 6 earthquake returned to normal after the earthquake.

de: Aufeinanderfolgende Ausbrüche des Semeru-Vulkans in Indonesien. Der Semeru-Vulkan im Osten der indonesischen Insel Java brach innerhalb von drei Stunden siebenmal aus und spritzte Asche bis zu einer Höhe von etwa 800 Metern. Während rund um den Vulkan ein Sicherheitsbereich eingerichtet wurde, waren an den Flussufern in der Region alle Aktivitäten verboten.
title: Endonezya'da Semeru Yanardağı'nda peş peşe patlamalar
description: Endonezya'nın Java Adası'nın doğusunda bulunan Semeru Yanardağı, 3 saatte 7 kez patlayarak yaklaşık 800 metre yüksekliğe kül püskürttü. Yanardağın çevresinde güvenlik çemberi oluşturulurken, bölgedeki nehir kıyılarında tüm faaliyetler yasaklandı.
en: Successive eruptions at Semeru Volcano in Indonesia. Semeru Volcano, located in the east of Indonesia's Java Island, erupted 7 times in 3 hours and sprayed ash to a height of approximately 800 meters. While a security perimeter was established around the volcano, all activities were banned on the river banks in the region.
la: Successivae eruptiones Semeru Volcano in Indonesia. de: Die Uhren blieben um 04.17 Uhr stehen! Seit den Erdbeben vom 6. Februar sind drei Jahre vergangen... In vielen Provinzen fanden Gedenkzeremonien statt. In vielen Provinzen wurden Gedenkprogramme für diejenigen organisiert, die bei den Erdbeben in Kahramanmaraş am 6. Februar 2023 ihr Leben verloren. Während Bürger, die ihre Verwandten verloren hatten, auf die Plätze der Stadt strömten, wurden Koranrezitationen und Gebete für die Erdbebenmärtyrer gesprochen.

en: The clocks stopped at 04.17! 3 years have passed since the February 6 earthquakes... Commemoration ceremonies were held in many provinces. Commemoration programs were organized in many provinces for those who lost their lives in the Kahramanmaraş-centered earthquakes on February 6, 2023. While citizens who lost their relatives flocked to the city squares, Quran recitations and prayers were made for the earthquake martyrs.
la: 04.17 in horologiis substitit! 3 anni elapsi sunt a die 6 Februarii terrae motus ... Commemoratio caerimoniae in multis provinciis habitae sunt. Der Abriss des symbolischen Bogens am Torre Sant'Andrea zog sowohl Einheimische als auch Touristen an, die die Gegend besuchten.

A rescue effort has been launched for the ship that called for help.

de: Mit der zunehmenden Belegung des Yuvacık-Staudamms in Kocaeli wurde die Wasseraufnahme aus dem von Dürre bedrohten Sapanca-See gestoppt. Die Wasseraufnahme aus dem Sapanca-See wurde gestoppt, nachdem die Auslastung des Yuvacık-Staudamms, der den größten Teil des Trinkwasserbedarfs von Kocaeli deckt, 42 Prozent erreicht hatte. Aufgrund der seit langem andauernden Dürre droht der Sapanca-See auszutrocknen und zu verschwinden.

en: With the increase in the occupancy of the Yuvacık Dam in Kocaeli, water intake from Sapanca Lake, which is in danger of drought, was stopped. Water intake from Sapanca Lake was stopped after the occupancy level of Yuvacık Dam, which meets most of Kocaeli's drinking water needs, reached 42 percent. Sapanca Lake is in danger of drying up and disappearing due to the drought that has been going on for a long time.

de: Die Regenfälle brachten frischen Wind für den Selevir-Staudamm: Ein vielversprechendes Bild vor der Bewässerungssaison. Der Wasserstand im Selevir-Staudamm im Bezirk Şuhut in Afyonkarahisar stieg mit den starken Regenfällen in den letzten zwei Monaten. Die Auslastung, die aufgrund der Dürre im vergangenen Sommer deutlich zurückgegangen war, erreichte wieder 50 Prozent.

The occupancy rate, which dropped significantly due to drought last summer, reached 50 percent again.

Negotiatio rate, quae signanter propter siccitatem aestate proxima omissa, 50 centesimis iterum attigit.

de: Erschreckender Bericht: Die drei heißesten Jahre auf dem Planeten wurden registriert. Das Jahr 2025, in dem sich die globale Erwärmung trotz des La-Niña-Effekts nicht verlangsamt, hat die Tür zu einer neuen Ära der Klimakrise geöffnet. Massive Brände, ausgelöst durch die Erwärmung der Ozeane und das gestörte Naturgleichgewicht, zeigen, dass Veränderungen keine Wahl mehr, sondern eine Notwendigkeit sind.

en: Frightening report: The three hottest years on the planet have been registered. The year 2025, when global warming does not slow down despite the La Niña effect, has opened the door to a new era in the climate crisis. Massive fires triggered by the warming of the oceans and the disrupted nature balance show that change is no longer a choice but a necessity.

Ignes ingentes calefactione oceanorum urgent et statera naturae perturbatae ostendunt mutationem non esse iam electionis sed necessitatis.

en: King Suppi returns to the stage... Cultural heritage has revived in Hatay. 3 years after the earthquake, damaged historical areas throughout Hatay were restored. The work at Hatay Archeology Museum has come to an end. The statue of King Suppiluliuma, the most important and world-renowned work in the museum, will be on display again after 3 years.
la: Rex Suppi redit in scenam... Hereditas culturalis in Hatay revixit. 3 annos post terrae motum, locis historicis per Hatay vexatis restituti sunt. Opus apud Hatay Museum Archaeologiam confectum est. Statua Suppiluliuma Regis, opus maximum et celeberrimum in museo, iterum post 3 annos in promptu erit.
content: p>Kahramanmara merkezli deprem, Hataydaki tarihi ve kültürel yaplarda da büyük ykma neden olmutu. Depremde hasar gören tarihi camiler, kiliseler aslna uygun yaplyor. Hasar gören Hatay Arkeoloji Mü… [+2059 chars]

de: Der Unterricht in Malatya wird am 6. Februar ausgesetzt. Es wurde berichtet, dass der Unterricht in den Schulen am 3. Jahrestag der Erdbebenkatastrophe in Malatya am 6. Februar 2023 für einen Tag ausgesetzt wird.
title: Malatya'da 6 Şubat'ta eğitime ara verilecek
description: Malatya'da 6 Şubat 2023'te meydana gelen deprem felaketinin 3. yılında okullarda eğitim öğretime 1 gün ara verileceği bildirildi.
en: Education will be suspended in Malatya on February 6. It was reported that education in schools will be suspended for 1 day on the 3rd anniversary of the earthquake disaster that occurred in Malatya on February 6, 2023.
la: Educationem suspendendam in Malatya Kalendis Februariis 6. Nuntiatum est educationem in scholis suspendi ad 1 diem in 3 anniversario calamitatis terrae motus quae in Malatya facta est die 6 Februarii 2023 .

de: Minister Yerlikaya: Dieser Schmerz war der gemeinsame Schmerz von 86 Millionen Menschen. Innenminister Ali Yerlikaya gab eine Erklärung in Adıyaman ab, wo er sich am Jahrestag der Erdbeben vom 6. Februar aufhielt.

description: İçişleri Bakanı Ali Yerlikaya 6 Şubat depremlerinin yıl dönümü dolayısıyla bulunduğu Adıyaman'da açıklamalarda bulundu.
en: Minister Yerlikaya: This pain was the common pain of 86 million. Minister of Internal Affairs Ali Yerlikaya made a statement in Adıyaman, where he was on the anniversary of the February 6 earthquakes.
la: Minister Yerlikaya: Hic dolor communis fuit poena 86 milionum. Minister Internorum Ali Yerlikaya denuntiationem in Adıyaman fecit, ubi in anniversario die 6 Februarii terrae motus factus est.

de: „Back Streets“ hat das Erdbeben nicht vergessen. Arka Sokaklar, die langjährige Serie von Kanal D, dreht eine Episode, die das Publikum zum Jahrestag der Erdbeben in Kahramanmaraş berühren wird.
title: 'Arka Sokaklar' depremi unutmadı
description: Kanal D’nin uzun soluklu dizisi Arka Sokaklar, Kahramanmaraş merkezli depremlerin yıl dönümünde izleyicileri duygulandıracak bir bölüme imza atıyor.
en: 'Back Streets' did not forget the earthquake. Kanal D's long-running series Arka Sokaklar is making an episode that will touch the audience on the anniversary of the earthquakes in Kahramanmaraş.

de: Stellvertretender Vorsitzender der AK-Partei Ali İhsan Yavuz: Die Wahlen finden im Jahr 2028 statt, eine vorgezogene Neuwahl steht auf unserer Agenda nicht. Der stellvertretende Vorsitzende der AK-Partei, Ali İhsan Yavuz, sagte: „Auf der Agenda von Türkiye stehen keine Wahlen, die Wahlen werden im Jahr 2028 stattfinden.“
title: AK Parti Genel Başkan Yardımcısı Ali İhsan Yavuz: Seçim 2028'de, gündemimizde erken seçim yok
description: AK Parti Genel Başkan Yardımcısı Ali İhsan Yavuz, "Türkiye'nin gündeminde seçim yok, seçim zamanında 2028'de yapılacak" dedi.
en: AK Party Deputy Chairman Ali İhsan Yavuz: The election is in 2028, there is no early election on our agenda. AK Party Deputy Chairman Ali İhsan Yavuz said, "There is no election on Türkiye's agenda, the election will be held in 2028."
la: AK Factionis Prorex Praeses Ali İhsan Yavuz: Comitia in 2028, nulla prima electio in nostris agenda est. AK Factionis Prorex Praeses Ali İhsan Yavuz dixit "Non est electio in agendis Türkiye, electio in anno 2028 habita est."

de: Minister Bak: Wir sind keine Erdbebentouristen wie manche Leute. Der Minister für Jugend und Sport, Osman Aşkın Bak, betonte, dass sie wichtige Investitionen im Hinblick auf das Erdbeben in Diyarbakır getätigt hätten und sagte: „Wir sind keine Erdbebentouristen wie manche Menschen. Wir haben unser Versprechen erfüllt.“
title: Bakan Bak: Birileri gibi deprem turisti değiliz
description: Gençlik ve Spor Bakanı Osman Aşkın Bak, Diyarbakır’da deprem konusunda önemli yatırımlar yaptıklarını vurgulayarak "Birileri gibi deprem turisti değiliz. Sözümüzü yerine getirdik" dedi.
en: Minister Bak: We are not earthquake tourists like some people. Minister of Youth and Sports, Osman Aşkın Bak, emphasized that they made important investments regarding earthquake in Diyarbakır and said, "We are not earthquake tourists like some people. We fulfilled our promise."
la: Minister Bak: Terrae motus non sumus peregrinatores sicut aliqui. Minister Iuventutis et Sports, Osman Aşkın Bak, inculcavit se magnas collocationes de terrae motu in Diyarbakır fecisse et dixit: "Non sumus terrae motus peregrinatores sicut aliqui. Promissionem nostram implevimus."

de: Der Sturm legte den Alltag in Tekirdağ lahm. Der in Tekirdağ wirksame Sturm hatte negative Auswirkungen auf das Leben. Während die Fischer nicht zur See fahren konnten, wurden die am Flughafen Çorlu Atatürk geplanten Trainingsflüge abgesagt.
title: Tekirdağ'da fırtına günlük yaşamı felç etti
description: Tekirdağ'da etkili olan fırtına yaşamı olumsuz etkiledi. Balıkçılar denize açılamazken, Çorlu Atatürk Havalimanı’nda ise planlanan eğitim uçuşları iptal edildi.
en: The storm paralyzed daily life in Tekirdağ. The storm that was effective in Tekirdağ had a negative impact on life. While fishermen could not go to sea, training flights planned at Çorlu Atatürk Airport were canceled.
la: Procella paralyticus in vita cotidiana Tekirda est. Tempestas quae in Tekirda efficax erat, labem in vita negativa habuit. Dum piscatores ad mare ire non poterant, exercitationes volatus in orlu Atatürk Airport remissi sunt.
